items.luconePlatform: Internal SaaS platform for managing client projects, invoices, and team workflows. Built for Lucone BV.
items.kasTelApp: Cash-register counting app for quick inventory and end-of-day validation.
items.storageTracker: Storage tracking tool to monitor stock levels, item locations, and usage trends.
items.minecraftPlugins: Custom Minecraft plugins built for private servers and gameplay experiments.
items.matchfinderrz: Prototype matching platform focused on fast teammate discovery and profile filtering.
items.socialMediaCalendar: Content planning workspace to schedule, organize, and review social posts.

details.luconePlatform: This platform combines CRM, task workflows, and billing in one internal dashboard. It is designed for daily operations and focuses on speed, auditability, and clear team ownership.
details.kasTelApp: Built to simplify cash-up moments at the end of shifts. The app records denomination counts, compares expected totals, and flags mismatches before final submission.
details.storageTracker: A practical system for product storage administration. It supports quick search, movement logs, and clear overviews so teams know exactly what is available and where.
details.minecraftPlugins: A set of plugin modules for mini-games, moderation tooling, and server-side quality-of-life features. Great for experimenting with event-driven architecture in Java.
details.matchfinderrz: An early-stage concept where users can be matched based on role preferences, availability, and shared goals. Focus was on filtering UX and rapid profile comparisons.
details.socialMediaCalendar: A lightweight content pipeline where ideas move from draft to publication. Includes planning per channel, status labels, and a compact timeline overview.

bio.headline: Building systems that scale thought.
bio.summary: I'm a software engineer passionate about distributed systems, developer tools, and the intersection of design and engineering. With over 5 years of experience building production systems, I approach every problem as an architecture challenge — seeking elegant, maintainable solutions that stand the test of scale.

experience.detail: Leading the platform team, designing APIs and infrastructure that serves millions of requests daily.
Built real-time data pipelines and microservice architecture for the analytics platform.
Full-stack development on customer-facing applications using React and Node.js.

education.detail: Focus on algorithms, distributed systems, and human-computer interaction.

philosophy.detail: I believe the best code tells a story. Every function name, every abstraction boundary, every commit message is an opportunity to communicate intent clearly to the next engineer.
Perfect is the enemy of deployed. I favor rapid iteration with strong observability over lengthy planning cycles.

bio.codeDetail: I believe the best code tells a story. Every function name, every abstraction boundary, every commit message is an opportunity to communicate intent clearly to the next engineer.
bio.shipDetail: Perfect is the enemy of deployed. I favor rapid iteration with strong observability over lengthy planning cycles.
